mapper.insert:
insert into chat_member (id, chat_id, user_id, role, join_at) values
(#{member.id}, #{member.chatId}, #{member.userId}, #{member.role}, #{member.joinAt})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.chat_name, c.type, c.relation_key, c.created_at from chat_member as cm inner join chat as c on cm.chat_id = c.id where cm.user_id = #{userId}
select u.id, u.username, u.avatar_url, cm.role, cm.join_at from chat_member as cm inner join user as u on cm.user_id=u.id where cm.chat_id=#{chatId}
